task_completion.description: Verify the agent opened the correct case in ArkCase.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The ArkCase web interface is visible, and the case titled 'Records Management Folder Setup - 2024-RM-0047' is actively opened or displayed in the main view.
A folder named exactly 'Evidence' (case-sensitive) is visible at the root level in the document or file management section of the case.
A folder named exactly 'Correspondence' (case-sensitive) is visible at the root level in the document or file management section of the case.
A folder named exactly 'Legal_Briefs' (case-sensitive) is visible at the root level in the document or file management section of the case.
A folder named exactly 'Witness_Statements' (case-sensitive) is visible at the root level in the document or file management section of the case.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the ArkCase web interface.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots should show the ArkCase web application UI being used to navigate and create folders, rather than terminal windows executing API curl commands or scripts.

integrity.description: Verify folders were created in the application, not the OS.
integrity.visual_evidence: The folders must be visible inside the ArkCase document management module within the web browser, not in a local Linux/OS file explorer window.

integrity.description: Verify the agent didn't just type the answers into a text editor.
integrity.visual_evidence: The folder names should appear as actual folder elements in the ArkCase UI, not just text typed into a notepad, text editor, or search bar.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The target case title is exactly 'Records Management Folder Setup - 2024-RM-0047'. The task requires creating four specific folders at the root level of the case's document section. The folder names must match exactly (case-sensitive): 'Evidence', 'Correspondence', 'Legal_Briefs', and 'Witness_Statements'. Underscores must be present where specified. The task must be performed within the ArkCase web application.
